personal.name: João Pedro Borges
personal.title: Computer Engineering Student // Full-Stack Developer // Game Creator
personal.bio: Computer Engineering student at SENAI CIMATEC, full-stack developer with a passion for Python, JavaScript, and C. I build everything from terminal tools and bots to games and web interfaces. Open source advocate, creative problem solver, and professional chaos organizer.
personal.shortBio: Building cool stuff at the intersection of code, creativity, and caffeine.
personal.funFact: Shadow the Hedgehog is literally me!
personal.dog: Shiva — Golden Retriever, the cutest coding buddy in the world

status.currentlyWorkingOn: Backrooms Online (multiplayer game), Mate Helper (AI desktop pet)
status.currentFocus: Computer Engineering at SENAI CIMATEC — Salvador, BA (2023–2027)

projects.name: HEXFEED
